title: Settings
subtitle: Appearance, cluster connection and keyboard shortcuts.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.desc: Customize the interface theme and language.
appearance.themeDesc: Choose a color scheme. System mode follows your OS light/dark setting.
appearance.languageDesc: Switch the display language of the interface.

cluster.title: Cluster Connection
cluster.desc: View information about the connected CubeOps instance.
cluster.endpointDesc: The public-facing CubeOps ops API address. Configure via CUBE_OPS_PUBLIC_HOST env var at startup.
cluster.desc: View information about the connected CubeAPI instance.
cluster.endpointDesc: The public-facing CubeAPI address. Configure via CUBE_API_PUBLIC_HOST env var at startup.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Built-in keyboard shortcuts for the Dashboard.
